query:
SELECT 
  e.id as exp_id,
  e.title as exp_title,
  e.basePrice,
  v.id as var_id,
  v.name as var_name,
  v.description,
  v.priceModifier,
  v.priceType,
  v.options,
  v.isRequired,
  v.sortOrder
FROM experiences e
LEFT JOIN experience_variants v ON v.experienceId = e.id
WHERE e.isActive = 1
ORDER BY e.title, v.sortOrder, v.name
LIMIT 80;

SELECT 
  e.id as exp_id,
  e.title as exp_title,
  e.basePrice,
  v.id as var_id,
  v.name as var_name,
  v.description,
  v.priceModifier,
  v.priceType,
  v.options,
  v.isRequired,
  v.sortOrder
FROM experiences e
LEFT JOIN experience_variants v ON v.experienceId = e.id
WHERE e.isActive = 1
ORDER BY e.title, v.sortOrder, v.name
LIMIT 80;
